name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: At 696 Thornton Parkway in Thornton, CO, Superb Cash Advance provides fast payday and title loans with extended hours daily.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance is located at 696 Thornton Parkway, suite 2, in downtown Thornton, CO. This standalone storefront serves Thornton residents and surrounding areas looking for quick financial assistance. The store is open Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, with convenient weekend hours Saturday and Sunday from 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM.

At this Thornton location, customers can apply for payday loans, title loans, and other fast cash solutions. The team is ready to help you navigate your options and process your application quickly. For specific questions or to discuss your situation, call 720-807-1227.

If you're a Thornton, CO resident facing an unexpected expense or short-term cash need, stop by this location with a valid ID, proof of income, and an active bank account. Superb Cash Advance aims to provide accessible lending when you need it most.
pros: Extended business hours (8:30pm weekdays, 6:30pm weekends) accommodate working customers
Same-day funding available for approved applicants
No credit check required; accepts all credit types including bad credit borrowers
Flexible, customized payment schedules developed with individual customers
Minimal documentation requirements for faster approval
Physical storefront location provides in-person accessibility and relationship-building
Consistently positive staff experience noted across multiple customer reviews
cons: No disclosed interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules on website—typical indicator of predatory pricing
Customer reviews contain geographic inconsistencies (Arvada, CO references mixed with Atlanta location) suggesting potential review authenticity issues
Short-term lending structure creates high-cost debt cycles; typical payday loans carry 300%+ APR equivalent
All credit types welcome signals targeting of vulnerable, credit-challenged populations
Limited information about actual loan terms, repayment periods, or default consequences
best_for: Individuals facing genuine short-term cash emergencies (unexpected medical bills, car repairs) who can repay within 2-4 weeks
Borrowers with poor credit unable to access bank loans or credit lines who need immediate funds
Working adults with irregular income who need flexible repayment scheduling
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best for working borrowers with poor credit facing genuine short-term emergencies who can reliably repay within weeks. Critical caveat: this is high-cost short-term lending (typically 300%+ APR equivalent) designed for emergency use only; it should never be treated as sustainable personal finance and creates debt cycles for borrowers who cannot repay quickly. Lack of transparent rate disclosure on their website is a major red flag indicating predatory pricing typical of the payday lending industry.
services: Same-day approval loans with minimal documentation
Quick installment loans with flexible payment schedules
In-person loan application at physical location
meta_description: Thornton, CO: Superb Cash Advance at 696 Thornton Pkwy - fast payday & title loans with extended weekend hours.
